title: Roasted Crisp Tunisian Mars Bar Toast
description: Crunchy Mars bar toast topped with roasted vegetables, perfect for a post-workout snack or dessert.
instructions: Place the chopped Mars bar, honey, mixed greens, bell pepper, onion, salt, and black pepper on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the olive oil over the ingredients and toss to coat.
Roast in the preheated oven for 12 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender and lightly caramelized.
Meanwhile, toast the whole wheat bread slices until crispy.
Spread a layer of roasted red peppers on each slice of toasted bread.
Top with a layer of mixed greens, chopped Mars bar, sliced almonds, and a sprinkle of smoked paprika.
Drizzle with lemon juice and garnish with chopped fresh cilantro and parsley.
Repeat the layers one more time, finishing with a slice of toasted bread on top.
Cut into squares or rectangles for serving.
